title: Workflow Definition
description: Schema for workflows/<name>.yaml — flat-graph workflow with explicit control flow

steps.description: Ordered list of workflow steps. Default execution is top-to-bottom; use next: to override.

output.description: Output bindings mapping keys to $.path references

nextField.description: Control flow: determines which step executes after this one. Omit for fall-through to the next step in the array.

switchNext.description: Value-based branching. Evaluates an expression against the step output and jumps to the matching case.

switch.description: Dot-path expression evaluated against the step output (e.g., output.category)

cases.description: Map of value → step ID. Each key is a possible value of the switch expression.

default.description: Step ID when no case matches. Required to prevent non-exhaustive branches.

ifNext.description: Binary branching. Evaluates a condition expression against the step output.

if.description: Condition expression evaluated against the step output (e.g., output.found, !output.is_valid)

then.description: Step ID when condition is truthy

else.description: Step ID when condition is falsy

configOverride.description: Step-level overrides for agent configuration. Only whitelisted fields are permitted.

model.description: Override the agent's model (e.g., use a cheaper model for fallback)

image_detail.description: Override vision detail level (only for image input agents)

max_attempts.description: Total attempts including the first try

backoff_ms.description: Base delay between retries (multiplied by attempt number)

fallbackConfig.description: Fallback agent if all retries fail. Executed once.

config.description: Config overrides for the fallback agent

inputBindings.description: Input bindings: maps param names to $.path references or literal values

requiresList.description: Binding paths this step depends on. Used for build-time reachability validation. If omitted, inferred from input bindings.

id.description: Unique step identifier (used in bindings as $.steps.<id> and as next: target)

agent.description: Agent ID (matches folder name in agentic-spec/agents/)

workflowStep.description: Invokes a sub-workflow. The sub-workflow envelope embeds in the parent step result under sub_envelope.

forEachStep.description: Dynamic fan-out: invokes an agent once per element in a runtime-determined array. Output is an array of per-iteration results in input-array order.

as.description: Loop variable name, available in input bindings via {{name}} interpolation

agent.description: Agent ID to invoke per element

max_concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent iterations. Omit to run all in parallel.

retry.description: Retry configuration per iteration (not the step as a whole)

parallelBlock.description: Concurrent execution of independent branches with a join strategy

id.description: Unique step identifier for the parallel block

join.description: Join strategy: all (wait for every branch), any (first to complete wins, cancel rest), all_settled (wait for all, tolerate failures)

branches.description: Independent branches that execute concurrently. Each branch is a steps array (mini-workflow) or a bare step (sugar for single-step branch).

parallelBranch.description: A branch within a parallel block. Contains a sequential list of steps.

steps.description: Sequential steps within this branch. Steps can reference earlier steps in the same branch but not sibling branches.

loopBlock.description: Bounded iteration: repeats a set of steps until a condition is met or max_iterations is reached

id.description: Unique step identifier for the loop block

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations (hard cap, prevents runaway loops)

until.description: Binding expression evaluated after each iteration. Loop exits when truthy. (e.g., $.steps.review.output.is_satisfactory)

steps.description: Steps to execute each iteration. Steps can reference their own prior outputs (overwritten each iteration).
